question: Based on the stacked area chart showing quarterly store operations indicators, which quarter appears to have the best overall performance?

options.A: Q1 has the best overall performance.
options.B: The chart cannot determine overall performance accurately because it combines different types of indicators that cannot be meaningfully added together.
options.C: Q3 has the best overall performance.
options.D: Q4 has the best overall performance, with the highest total area.

explanation: The chart stacks unrelated metrics (Revenue, Energy Usage, etc.) into a cumulative area. These metrics have different units and meanings, so adding them together creates a meaningless total. The stacked area cannot be used to assess overall performance. Only individual metric analysis is valid.
